pageTitle: Slay the Spire 2 Card Tier List
updatedNote: Rankings from Mobalytics (Jun 24, 2026). Early Access — expect updates as the meta evolves.
intro: Preliminary card tier list for each of the five characters. Rankings help evaluate picks during a run; read the tier definitions below — rank alone does not tell the whole story.
disclaimer: Slay the Spire 2 is in Early Access. This is an early look while mechanics are still being explored. Future balance patches will change rankings.
evaluation: Each run is contextual: a card can be outstanding in one deck and useless in another. More flexible cards rate higher. Rankings consider the base card and its upgraded version.
multiplayerNote: Multiplayer-only cards are excluded from this list.

tiers.label: S-Tier
tiers.description: The best of the best. Highly sought after regardless of run, almost always positive. Often run-defining and gives direction to your deck.

tiers.label: A-Tier
tiers.description: Often run-warping, but not always worth adding at every point. May need key combo pieces to shine or only excel during part of a run.

tiers.label: B-Tier
tiers.description: May be slightly niche but still provides good value. Not always best-in-slot, or may fall off late game, but serviceable.

tiers.label: C-Tier
tiers.description: Often extremely niche but can solve specific deck problems. Desperation picks to fix short-term issues.

tiers.label: D-Tier
tiers.description: Usually over-costed, clunky, weak in most cases, or even harmful to add to the deck.

tiers.label: TBD
tiers.description: To be determined — not enough data yet to rank confidently.
